title: BiggerHotbar
description: Client side mod that extends the vanilla hotbar.
body: This mod works fully clientside! ![Hotbar scrolling preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c6880339f2f22498f80b45cad8379790eb7bd63.gif) This mod allows you to use the bottom row of your inventory as 9 extra hotbar slots. You can scroll seamlessly into your virtual second hotbar, your items are automatically swapped, but visually nothing changes. It looks just like you're directly using the items from your inventory in your hotbar. The mod will remember your correct item positions, so no need to worry about your inventory getting messed up when you leave or join a world/server. --- [](https://discord.com/invite/jpFJG8dujR) [](https://ko-fi.com/kasetoatz) [](https://paypal.me/KaasToast) Looking for a fun place to play Minecraft and try out some of my mods? Come hang out on the El Basurero SMP! - **IP:** `play.ebsmp.com` - **Recommended Version:** 26.1.2 (other versions work too!) - **Bedrock Edition:** Supported - **Bonus:** Test out most of my server-side mods live in-game! For more info check the [docs](https://ebsmp.com/)!
